trigger.description: The v1 binary exposes `ee serve --foreground` as an honest defer-to-v2 surface instead of starting a localhost HTTP/SSE adapter.

expected_emission.repair_string: Track bd-3usjw.4 and docs/adr/0033-serve-localhost-v2-design.md; use direct CLI commands such as `ee context`, `ee search`, `ee why`, and `ee status` for now.
